news.headline: Online On-Demand Home Services Market in Southeast Asia to grow by USD 2.27 trillion from 2024-2028 at a CAGR of 86.02%.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the influence of AI on market dynamics indicates significant growth in the Online On-Demand Home Services Market in Southeast Asia. The market is projected to expand by a substantial USD 2.27 trillion between 2024 and 2028, with a forecasted compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 86.02%. This data, provided by Technavio, highlights the remarkable growth potential within this sector in the coming years.

news.headline: Paper and Paperboard Container and Packaging Market in APAC to grow by USD 21.3 billion by 2028, driven by AI and retail-ready packaging trends - Technavio.
news.summary: In the evolving market scenario, AI is transforming the landscape significantly. The Paper and Paperboard Container and Packaging Market in the Asia-Pacific region is projected to witness a substantial growth of USD 21.3 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per findings from Technavio. The market is anticipated to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.2%, showcasing the surge in demand and adoption of AI technologies in this sector.

news.headline: Walgreens partners with Dion's Chicago Dream for Dream Vault Smart Locker providing free produce to 175+ households weekly.
news.summary: Each week, the Dream Vault initiative will distribute fresh produce to over 175 households in Chicago for free. The collaboration between Walgreens and non-profit Dion's Chicago Dream aims to enhance health equity and food security in the area. This effort is set to make a significant impact on the community by providing high-quality produce to those in need.

news.headline: Billionaire investor bets on Trump win with inflation trades.
Realty ONE Group leaders are optimistic about real estate's future during a strategic event in California, on Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: Worldwide executives are joining forces both virtually and in California for a conference focused on refining business strategies and mindsets. The event is set to take place in Laguna Niguel, California on October 22, 2024. Realty ONE Group International, a rapidly expanding franchisor known for its purpose-driven approach, will be one of the key participants at the event. This gathering will provide a platform for global leaders to collaborate and enhance their strategic thinking.

news.headline: Westrock Coffee launches new website westrockcoffee.com on Oct. 22, 2024, showcasing sustainable beverage solutions.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas on October 22, 2024, the Westrock Coffee Company (Nasdaq: WEST), a prominent beverage solutions provider for renowned brands globally, unveiled its updated website at westrockcoffee.com. The company is known for its commitment to excellence and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Schneider National introduces a new platform (Schneider FreightPower®) offering increased freight options for owner-operators.
news.summary: Schneider National, Inc., a leading multimodal provider of transportation, intermodal, and logistics services based in Green Bay, Wisconsin, has introduced the Schneider FreightPower® platform designed to improve business operations with owner-operators. This platform, recently expanded and updated, aims to offer owner-operators increased access to a wide array of freight options provided by Schneider. The platform features user-friendly functionality and search capabilities tailored to enhance flexibility and ease of use for owner-operators. Schneider National, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SNDR.

news.headline: Billionaire hedge fund manager Paul Tudor Jones advocates being 'long Bitcoin, long Gold' as key inflation hedge, recommends blend with commodities and NASDAQ holdings for younger investors.
news.summary: During an interview on CNBC Squawk Box, billionaire hedge fund manager Paul Tudor Jones expressed bullish sentiments on Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), gold, and commodities as effective tools to guard against inflation. Tudor Jones conveyed his optimism by claiming that "All roads lead to inflation" and disclosed being bullish on gold, Bitcoin, and commodities. He stressed that commodities are significantly under-owned and emphasized his position in favor of them. Additionally, Tudor Jones noted that younger investors typically hedge against inflation with NASDAQ investments, but recommended a mix of gold, Bitcoin, commodities, and NASDAQ holdings for better inflation protection. The full story can be read on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ethema Health Corporation (OTCPINK: GRST) signs APA to purchase business assets of Edgewater Recovery Center LLC in Florida.
news.summary: A company based in West Palm Beach, Florida, Ethema Health Corporation (OTCPINK: GRST), recently announced on October 22, 2024, that they have entered into a binding Asset Purchase Agreement to acquire the business operations and operational assets of Edgewater. The agreement does not include any real property of Edgewater. This transaction is significant for Ethema as it marks a strategic move in expanding its business.

news.headline: Get ready for the 'X Empire' Telegram game airdrop as the Elon Musk-themed game launches its token on The Open Network this week.
news.summary: A new game called X Empire, which is inspired by Elon Musk, will be launching its token on The Open Network this week. The game is set to conduct an airdrop, and here are the key details you should be aware of.

news.headline: Meta Quest sponsors Wrexham AFC and Wrexham AFC Women, featured on player kits until 2025/26 season.
news.summary: In Wrexham, Wales, Wrexham AFC has revealed Meta Quest as their new back-of-shirt sponsor starting today. This partnership will extend through the 2025/26 season for both the men’s and women’s teams. Meta Quest will serve as the Official Mixed Reality Partner for Wrexham AFC and Wrexham AFC Women, with their name and logo prominently displayed on the back of the players’ jerseys during home and away matches. The announcement was made as Wrexham AFC players arrived at the STōK Cae grounds.

news.headline: Millennials prioritizing investments in stocks, ETFs, personal finance, and student loans for future planning.
news.summary: Discover the latest insights into millennial investment strategies and retirement planning. Uncover surprising trends as millennials focus on stocks, ETFs, personal finance, and managing student loans. Stay informed on how this generation is approaching financial planning for the future.

news.headline: Treasury yields surge as investors bet on Trump's return, stock market unaffected. Trump effect fuels rise.
news.summary: Yields on Treasury bonds are on the rise due in part to speculation that Donald Trump may secure another term as president. This surge has not impacted the stock market as of yet.

news.headline: Boeing reports Q3 earnings, proposes 35% pay hike in new offer to union members, stock price surges.
news.summary: On Wednesday, Boeing released its third-quarter financial results. Following this, the stock for BA has seen an increase in value after the aircraft manufacturer offered a new proposal to striking union workers. The offer entails a 35% pay raise, which is set to be voted on by the union members. This development has caused a positive impact on Boeing's stock performance.

news.headline: GM stock rises after surpassing earnings and revenue expectations. Third guidance hike in 2021 due to strong truck demand.
news.summary: General Motors (GM) exceeded expectations with its earnings and revenue, driven by strong demand for trucks. The company's stock showed a bullish signal by breaking out. This marks GM's third earnings guidance hike this year, indicating its continued growth and financial strength.

news.headline: General Dynamics reaches new high, shows improving performance with Relative Strength Rating upgrade. Earnings due soon.
news.summary: General Dynamics has recently received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. The military giant has reached a new high, with earnings expectations upcoming. Investors are now questioning whether this positive momentum will be sustained in the future.

news.headline: GoPivot to host 2nd Charity Pickleball Event at Atlanta Pickleball Center, benefitting The LaunchPad Foundation.
news.summary: In Atlanta on October 22, 2024, GoPivot, a prominent company offering Corporate Wellness, Safety, and Recognition solutions, revealed details about their upcoming second annual charity Pickleball Event, "Battle For The Golden Paddle." The event aims to raise funds for The LaunchPad.

news.headline: Alkimi aims to disrupt $600 billion digital ads industry with decentralized exchange. Google under scrutiny for manipulating prices. Advertisers seek blockchain for transparency & efficiency in ad spending. Luxury brands united to create Aura Blockchain Consortium.
news.summary: Global advertising spending is projected to hit $667 billion in 2024, with a notable increase due to the U.S. Presidential election. However, a study by ISBA reveals that 15% of digital ad spending is untraceable, raising concerns about supply chain transparency. Google is under government scrutiny for allegedly manipulating display ad prices and monopolizing the market. Despite Google's dominance in online advertising, competitors like Meta and Amazon offer alternative options. There is growing interest in leveraging blockchain technology for ad campaigns to enhance transparency and efficiency. Luxury brands such as LVMH, Prada, and Cartier have come together to form the Aura Blockchain Consortium in Q2 of 2024 to explore blockchain solutions for advertising. The focus is on using Web 3.0 technology to overcome limitations imposed by Web 2.0 giants.

news.headline: Schwarzkopf partners with Jonathan Colombini as new Global Color Expert to provide guidance on home coloring.
news.summary: Schwarzkopf, a top player in hair products worldwide, has teamed up with Jonathan Colombini to assist at-home users in achieving professional color results with Schwarzkopf Keratin Color. This collaboration aims to provide expert guidance to consumers. The partnership was announced in Düsseldorf, Germany on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Gas prices, which had surged post Ukraine conflict, are now at their lowest since February, as U.S. election nears.
news.summary: Following Russia's invasion of Ukraine, fuel prices experienced a substantial increase. However, they have recently plummeted to the lowest point they have reached since February. This decrease in prices signifies a significant change in the market, offering relief to consumers who have been grappling with high costs.

news.headline: Xentina Digital Group marks 20th anniversary. Founded by Dante Fiorini and Ximena Primo, the company has grown globally.
news.summary: In Mission Viejo, California, Dante Fiorini, the Founder and Strategic Director of Xentina Digital Group, shared news of the company's 20th anniversary. Fiorini expressed gratitude for reaching this significant milestone, highlighting the company's journey from a dream to a successful reality. Founded by Fiorini and partner Ximena Primo, Xentina Digital Group has expanded its reach beyond initial expectations. Specializing in marketing and design, the agency has flourished over the two decades since its establishment.

news.headline: CUPE Local 3550 in Alberta to start strike action on October 24th, meeting attended by hundreds with support from president.
news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, members of CUPE Local 3550 held a virtual meeting on October 21st to strategize for their upcoming strike set to start on October 24th. The meeting was attended by hundreds of members who raised numerous questions, shared words of encouragement, and asked for "I love education support workers" signs for their communities. Rory Gill, the CUPE Alberta president, joined the meeting to provide assistance and updates to the members.

Pennsylvania's median home sales price decreases slightly, with more listings hitting the market in September 2024.
news.summary: In Lemoyne, Pennsylvania, the housing market in September 2024 experienced a slight drop in the median home sales price. This decrease was accompanied by a rise in available inventory, indicating a possible alleviation for prospective buyers looking to enter the market. These changes signify a potential shift in the real estate landscape, offering more options for buyers.

(MetOx), known for its expertise in producing High Temperature Superconducting (HTS) wire, has revealed that it is in discussions to secure $80 million in funding from the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE). This funding is intended to support the company in establishing a...

news.headline: WR Berkley exceeds Q3 earnings but misses sales estimates. Stock falls by 4.7%, analysts raise price target to $57.
news.summary: W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) announced better-than-expected results for the third quarter. They reported earnings of 93 cents per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of 92 cents per share. However, their quarterly sales of $3.400 billion fell short of the estimated $3.444 billion. As a result, WR Berkley shares dropped by 4.7% to $58.14 on Tuesday. Following the earnings report, Evercore ISI Group analyst David Motemaden upheld an In-Line rating for WR Berkley and increased the price target from $57. Analysts adjusted their price targets for the company subsequent to the announcement of the earnings.

news.headline: Rafael Correa elected to OHI Board of Directors, joining 7 others to influence outdoor hospitality industry future.
news.summary: Rafael Correa, President and CFO of Blue Water, has recently been elected as one of eight new members to the OHI Board in Ocean City, MD, on October 22, 2024. This appointment signifies an opportunity for Correa to contribute to the future of outdoor hospitality alongside other industry leaders.

news.headline: Big3 and Tucker Tooley collaborate for a new docuseries about the league, set to be released in summer 2025.
news.summary: An upcoming series led by Tooley promises a one-of-a-kind viewing experience, blending entertainment with exploration of the League's history, present, and future. The fully financed project is currently in pre-production, with thematic episodes set to showcase the competitive spirit of the Summer 2025 season. Audiences can expect an in-depth look at eight years of previously unreleased League content.

news.headline: AI-driven report forecasts Malaysia's online home services market to surge by USD 524.63M from 2024-2028, boosting revenue growth.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market trends, specifically focusing on the Online On-Demand Home Services Market in Malaysia. The market is projected to experience a substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 5524.63 million expected between 2024 and 2028. According to Technavio, this growth represents a remarkable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 90.7%.

news.headline: Timbaland named strategic advisor at AI music company Suno; exclusive "Love Again" stream, remix contest on October 23.
news.summary: Renowned artist Timbaland and Alejandro have released their new track, "Love Again," exclusively available for streaming on Suno. In addition, Suno will kick off its Remix Contest on October 23, 2024. This news comes as another significant milestone for the four-time GRAMMY® Award-winning multi-platinum artist, entrepreneur, and creator.

news.headline: Breast Cancer Summit held at South University with BCRC, honoring survivors and raising awareness ROUND ROCK, Texas.
news.summary: A recent event held in Round Rock, Texas on October 22, 2024, saw South University, Austin partnering with the Breast Cancer Resource Center of Texas. The event aimed to honor breast cancer survivors, raise awareness about survivorship challenges, and offer various resources. The collaboration worked towards supporting individuals impacted by breast cancer and engaging the community in this cause.

news.headline: Tevogen Bio plans to update revenue forecast of $1 billion each for two therapeutic areas, estimating 5-year total of $28-36 billion.
news.summary: In Warren, New Jersey, as of October 22, 2024, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: TVGN), a clinical-stage specialty immunotherapy biotech company, is preparing to share additional information regarding its revenue projections for Tevogen Oncology and Tevogen Specialty Care. The forecasted revenue for each of these therapeutic areas upon launch is around $1 billion. Over a 5-year period, the combined estimated revenue for both areas ranges from $28 billion to $36 billion.

NYMEX Gasoline November futures settle at $2.0715 a gallon.
US perfume market set to grow by $3.91B from 2024-2028, boosted by rising living standards. AI reshaping market dynamics.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI technology has projected significant growth in the US perfume market. It is expected to increase by USD 3.91 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a CAGR of 10.52% during this period. This growth is attributed to various factors such as improving consumer purchasing power.

news.headline: NYMEX WTI Crude November futures settle at $72.09 a barrel, up $1.53, 2.17%.
Child care operators, educators and parents in Ontario distance themselves from for-profit owners' campaign against $10-a-day child care; backlash grows.
news.summary: In Ontario, child care organizations, educators, and families are denouncing the actions of for-profit child care owners who are initiating rolling closures in the province. Carolyn Ferns from the Ontario Coalition for Better Child Care highlighted the increasing opposition within the community against the strategies of this group supported by Alberta. Both major and minor child care providers have communicated their grievances to their families.

news.headline: Zions Bancorp beats Q3 expectations with earnings of $1.37/share ($1.17 est.) and sales of $798M ($778.857M est.). CEO highlights financial improvement.
news.summary: Zions Bancorporation (NASDAQ:ZION) announced their third-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The company posted quarterly earnings of $1.37 per share, exceeding the predicted $1.17 per share. Additionally, quarterly sales stood at $798 million, higher than the estimated $778.857 million. Chairman and CEO Harris H. Simmons highlighted the 21% increase in earnings per share from the previous year and noted the strengthening net interest margin, rising to 3.03% from last year's 2.93%. Operating costs saw a modest 1% increase. Noninterest-bearing demand deposits slightly declined by 1.7% compared to the prior quarter, but remained steady compared to the previous quarter's conclusion, indicating stability in this vital low-cost funding source.

news.headline: CFTC chair discusses election betting and crypto regulation in recent interview.
Test for sophisticated investors, conducted by Bloomberg, assesses financial knowledge and experience.
Axway ranked as Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for API Management with top score of 3 in Critical Capabilities.
news.summary: Axway, a leading API Management company listed on Euronext (AXW.PA), has been recognized by Gartner as a Leader in the 2024 Magic Quadrant™ for API Management for their product, Amplify API Management. This positioning is a result of an evaluation that assessed the company's vision comprehensiveness and operational effectiveness. Additionally, in Gartner's companion research on Critical Capabilities for API Management, Axway achieved the highest score of 3.

news.headline: Smirnoff teams with Matchbox for NFL fans to enhance Thursday Night Football experiences. NYC, Oct 22, 2024.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance Thursday Night Football experiences, Smirnoff has partnered with Matchbox, the popular matchmaking software. This collaboration aims to bring football fans together, including rivals, for unique game day experiences. With the NFL season in full swing, the partnership is set to offer unparalleled opportunities for fans to connect and engage. The initiative is scheduled to kick off on Thursday nights and promises to create memorable moments for football enthusiasts. This innovative approach is expected to resonate with a large audience, as fans eagerly anticipate the upcoming matchups. Stay tuned for exciting developments as Smirnoff and Matchbox unite to transform Thursday nights for football fans.

news.headline: Parking Base integrates with Google to enable parking reservations through Google Maps and Search, improving driver convenience.
news.summary: A recent development in Fort Lee, New Jersey highlights Parking Base's partnership with Google, enabling drivers to conveniently book parking spaces through Google Maps and Google Search. This integration aims to streamline the parking reservation process and enhance user experience. This collaboration is set to benefit a significant number of drivers by providing them with a seamless and efficient way to secure parking spots.

news.headline: Lisa Weiss, 3X Emmy®-winning producer, launches "Object Diaries" podcast revealing stories behind secret objects.
news.summary: Award-winning producer Lisa Weiss has recently launched a new podcast titled "Object Diaries," which delves into the stories behind secret objects. The podcast, a limited series, has garnered 3 Emmy® Awards for Weiss. This venture aims to unveil the intriguing narratives hidden within various mysterious objects. The podcast, launched in Chicago on October 22, 2024, promises to provide listeners with a unique and engaging experience as it reveals the untold stories related to different objects. Through "Object Diaries," Weiss brings her expertise and creativity to showcase the unexpected tales behind seemingly ordinary objects, adding a new dimension to the podcasting realm.

news.headline: Polymarket reviewing user base after whales bet millions on Trump win, with one user wagering over $18 million.
news.summary: Blockchain prediction market Polymarket is reviewing its user base to ensure compliance with regulations, as there has been a surge in bets favoring Donald Trump for the upcoming presidential election. The platform is particularly focused on verifying large wagers and ensuring they are from users outside the U.S. One user, Fredi9999, has bet over $18 million on Republican outcomes, including $13 million on Trump's victory. This user is the largest bettor in Polymarket's election market and the platform's most profitable account. The company is facing increased scrutiny over its U.S. political markets, prompting the review of its user base.

news.headline: Erin West leads Operation Shamrock, combating crypto crimes and pig butchering scams with innovative law enforcement strategies.
news.summary: Erin West spearheads Operation Shamrock, a strategic initiative targeting crypto crimes and fraudulent pig butchering schemes. Through innovative law enforcement approaches and collaboration, the operation has made significant strides in combating these illegal activities. The initiative has successfully resolved ** cases of crypto fraud and ** instances of pig butchering scams to date, showcasing the effectiveness of their efforts. For further information, please refer to the full article.

news.headline: Subsidiary of Stellar MLS, UCO, shines at International MLS Forum in Milan among global leaders. Fastest-growing in the world.
news.summary: In Altamonte Springs, Florida on October 22, 2024, UCO, a branch of Stellar MLS, a prominent multiple listing service in the U.S. and the fastest-expanding globally, participated in the second annual International MLS Forum in Italy alongside leaders from various countries. The event served as a platform for global MLS discussions and collaborations, highlighting the exponential growth of Stellar MLS as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Bitmedia introduces Wallet Targeting Technology for web3 advertising, offering targeted blockchain audiences with unprecedented accuracy. This feature allows advertisers to tap into blockchain audiences based on their wallet holdings and activities, with an anonymous ID assigned to users' devices for privacy. The technology aims to transform the way brands connect with their web3 customers, providing a platform for unmatched ROI.
news.summary: Bitmedia.IO has introduced Wallet Targeting Technology in Web3 advertising, enabling advertisers to reach blockchain audiences accurately. The technology involves users connecting their wallets, providing anonymous data for targeted ads based on blockchain activity. Audience segmentation categorizes individuals by wallet holdings and activities, allowing personalized ads. Bitmedia's Web3 cookie library facilitates user engagement tracking for improved ROI. This innovation transforms brand-customer connections in the Web3 space. (words: 83, characters: 505)
